etymology.description: ĺ”Ż(ĺ”Ż) (wĂ©i, "only") phonetic + éłĄ(éłĄ) (niÇŽo, "bird") semantic = bird making a sound -> cry of a bird
etymology.interpretation: The character combines ĺ”Ż(ĺ”Ż) (wĂ©i, "only"), which provides the phonetic component, with éłĄ(éłĄ) (niÇŽo, "bird"), which indicates the semantic field relating to birds. This suggests a specific sound associated with birds, resulting in the meaning "cry of a bird."
